differentials.name: inner / outer table of calvarium
differentials.raw: inner / outer table of calvarium (usually from external table)

context: =  benign tumor of membranous bone (= hamartoma) Histo:   mature compact / cancellous bone Age:   adult life Associated with:   Gardner syndrome (multiple osteomas + colonic polyposis) Location:   craniofacial bones √  non-tooth-related circumscribed sclerotic mass DDx:   idiopathic osteosclerosis WITHOUT bone expansion cannot be differentiated from osteoma. √  well-circumscribed round extremely dense structureless lesion usually < 2 cm in size √  ± bone expansion / exophytic growth √  NO perilesional halo Fibrous Osteoma Probably a form of fibrous dysplasia Age:     childhood √  less dense th
